Notice Of Plaintiff Jocelyn Fraustos Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories And Request For Production, Set Nos. One And Two
Off Calendar Aug-10-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. GREGORY L. SPALLAS, ESQ. of Phillips Spallas & Angstadt LLP, Tel No. 415-278-9400 appearing for Plaintiff;
Atty. ROBERT HINCKLEY, ESQ. of Messner Reeves LLP, Tel No. 303-623-1800 appearing telephonically for Defendant Chipotle Mexican Grill, Inc.

RULING - Parties stipulate to matter being heard by Judge Pro Tem David McDonald. Matter discussed by the Court and counsel. The Court orders off calendar PLAINTIFF JOCELYN FRUASTO'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories And Request For Production, Set Nos. One And Two. Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Plaintiff Jocelyn Fraustos Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories And Request For Production, Set Nos. One And Two
Off Calendar Jun-15-2015 Continued To Aug-10-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gregory Spallas of Phillips Spallas & Angstadt LLP telephone number 415-278-9400 for Plaintiff.
Eric De Wames of Messner Reeves LLP telephone number 310-622-9341 appeared by telephone for Defendant.

The Parties stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter was argued. The Court and Counsel discussed information on the documents to be produced prior to the next hearing. Upon conclusion of argument, Plaintiff Jocelyn Frausto's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories And Request For Production, Set Nos. One And Two is continued for a further hearing to August 10, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 302.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)
